title: Royal City (disambiguation)
content:
'''Royal City''' may refer to:
*The [[Kashyyyk Royal City/Legends|Kashyyyk Royal City]]
*[[Ranadaast]], the Duros Royal City
*[[Royal City (Alzar)|Royal City]], a [[City/Legends|city]] on [[Alzar]]
*[[Royal City (Toydaria)|Royal City]], a city on [[Toydaria]]
